title: elatostema goudotianum var. coursii
intro: Elatostema goudotianum var. coursii, also known as the Cours' Elatostema, is a variety of the Elatostema goudotianum plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and aid in wound healing. The health benefits of Elatostema goudotianum var. coursii include its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Traditionally, this plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, with the leaves being used to make a herbal remedy that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
